/CAL: DEFENSE PROPOSITION 47 PETITION FOR RECLASSIFICATION/NP/CONTD: SAME,AND FOR RECEIPT OF APD SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT/SUPP:12-04-17/S18/CTORD: APDREPORT TO INCLUDE COPY OF ORIGINAL POLICE INCIDENT REPORT/CTORD:APD TO FORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/
/CAL: DEFENSE PROPOSITION 47 PETITION/NP/SUPP:09-07-17/S18)/CTORD:APD TOFORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/CONTD: SAME, AND RECEIPT OF APD SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT/
MO W/D PLEA NG GRTD;ADV/PERS W/CONSTL/CITIZ RTS;PLD G CT1-459PC/F/2NDDEGPLD G CTS2-496(A)PC/F & CT3-466PC/F;CRT MKES FNDGS/ACCEPTS PLEACRT GRTS DA MO DISM REM CHRGS
/CAL: DEFENSE PROPOSITION 47 PETITION/NP/X: WITHDRAWN BY COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT,

TRANSF TO D25 FOR HG REV PROB AT 845AM ON 2/18/94
CONT 8/9/93 AT 845AM IN D25 FOR WALDEN HSE REPORT
